# Turn Mock Into Real HubSpot API

Use this prompt with any AI coding tool after the mock example works:

```text
Read this repo and the relevant recipe first. I have a mock-first HubSpot feature working locally.

Help me replace mock data with real HubSpot API access safely. Ask one question at a time. Do not ask me to paste tokens, secrets, portal IDs, customer data, or CRM exports into chat.

Before editing code, write down:
- the HubSpot object type
- the exact properties needed
- the minimum scopes needed
- the auth path
- where secrets will be stored
- what logs must avoid
- what local check I should run after the change

Then make the smallest safe code change and keep a mock mode available.
```
